title: helianthus gracilis
intro: Helianthus gracilis, also known as Slender Sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus gracilis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in dried form for soups and other culinary applications.
